title: Fight Arena

startPoint.en: Talk to Lady Servil, just north-west of the fight arena, which is south of Ardougne.
startPoint.es: Habla con Lady Servil, justo al noroeste de la arena de combate, al sur de Ardougne.

items.name: Armour
items.display: Armour, weapons and food (Ranged not recommended). Make sure you have enough food to survive in battle against the monsters below.

items.name: 3 free inventory slots during the first stage of the quest (2 for your armour and 1 for the beer)
items.display: 3 free inventory slots during the first stage of the quest (2 for your armour and 1 for the beer)

recommended.name: Ardougne cloak
recommended.display: Any Ardougne cloak, for the Kandarin monastery Teleport.

kills: General Khazard twice (level 84 - this is an optional kill)

text.en: Talk to Lady Servil west of the Monastery which is south of Ardougne.
text.es: Habla con Lady Servil al oeste del Monastery, que está al sur de Ardougne.

text.en: Head east and into the northeasternmost building (south of the monastery).
text.es: Dirígete al este y entra en el edificio más al noreste (al sur del monasterio).

text.en: Borrow the Khazard armour from the northeasternmost suit of armour.
text.es: Pide prestada la Khazard armour de la armadura situada más al noreste.

text.en: Equip the armour and enter the prison south of the building where you got the equipment (east of the big circle of the arena in the map).
text.es: Equípate la armadura y entra en la prisión al sur del edificio donde conseguiste el equipamiento (al este del gran círculo de la arena en el mapa).

text.en: Talk to the Lazy Khazard Guard sitting in the south-eastern corner of the jail.
text.es: Habla con el Lazy Khazard Guard sentado en la esquina sureste de la cárcel.

text.en: Talk to Angor in the bar to the west, and buy a bottle of Khali brew for five coins.
text.es: Habla con Angor en el bar del oeste y compra una Khali brew por cinco monedas.

chatOptions: 2 I'd like a Khali brew, please.

text.en: Run back and talk to the Lazy Khazard Guard. Wait for him to pass out and then Steal keys from the table.
text.es: Vuelve corriendo y habla con el Lazy Khazard Guard. Espera a que se quede inconsciente y luego roba las llaves de la mesa.

text.en: Use the keys on Sammy's cell door north of Lazy Khazard Guard.
text.es: Usa las llaves en la celda de Sammy, al norte del Lazy Khazard Guard.
Abre la puerta de la prisión.

text.en: Kill General Khazard or walk out the door.
text.es: Mata a General Khazard o sal por la puerta.

text.en: Talk to Lady Servil at the quest start point northwest of the arena.
text.es: Habla con Lady Servil en el punto de inicio de la misión, al noroeste de la arena.
